---
title: "gaulss_predict"
generated: true
description: "Per-element Gaussian location-scale prediction on a (new) design."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.gaulss`](../nitrix-stats-gaulss.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:gaulss_predict -->
```python
gaulss_predict(result: GauLSSResult, X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, scale_design: Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']] = None) -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'V N'], Float[Array, 'V N']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:gaulss_predict -->
Per-element Gaussian location-scale prediction on a (new) design.

Returns the pair `(mean, scale)` -- the heteroscedastic point of the
model -- on the new covariates: the mean $\mu = X \beta_{\mu}$
(identity link) and the standard deviation
$\sigma = \exp(Z \beta_{\sigma})$ (log link).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:gaulss_predict -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `result` | `GauLSSResult` | — | — | Fit output from [`gaulss_fit`](../nitrix-stats-gaulss/gaulss_fit.qmd). |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | Mean-model design matrix, with the same columns as the fit. |
| `scale_design` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']]` | — | `None` | Scale-model design matrix; `None` (default) uses an intercept column of shape `(N, 1)` -- the homoscedastic default matching [`gaulss_fit`](../nitrix-stats-gaulss/gaulss_fit.qmd). Must have the same column count `q` that the fit's scale model used. |

**Returns** `Tuple[Float[Array, 'V N'], Float[Array, 'V N']]`. Predicted mean for each element and observation. Predicted standard deviation for each element and observation. Both outputs are differentiable with respect to their designs and the fitted coefficients.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:gaulss_predict -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
